answers: Gain weight: eat in calorie surplus (300-500 extra/day), focus on protein (1.6-2.2g per kg bodyweight), and strength train.
Bulking tips: eat 5-6 meals daily, add calorie-dense foods (nuts, avocado, olive oil), and lift heavy progressively.
Muscle building: combine calorie surplus with progressive overload training. Focus on compound lifts. Sleep 7-9 hours for recovery.
Ojon barano: beshhi khao, protein beshhi khao (dim, mach, dal), gym e heavy weight tolo, ar enough ghum dao.
